creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
One of the best Business Lunch deals we’ve tried in Dubai! 

📍 CLAP, Building 11, Gate Village, DIFC, Dubai
⭐️ Michelin Guide selected restaurant

Business Lunch: 
🕛 12 to 3:30 PM, Monday to Friday
📲 Advance reservation recommended 
🍴 3-course menu: AED 115 per person
This includes: 
* Miso Soup
* Two starters which came in generous portions and can be shared.
* One main dish. I had Salmon Teriyaki while Ed had Wagyu Beef Donburi.
* Additional AED 35 when you order dessert. 

Tag your lunch date!
